name: Chocolate-Toffee Flan Cakes
recipeInstructions:
Mix marshmallow cream and milk together over low heat.
Blend in melted chocolate. Cool slightly. Fold in cool whip and chopped candy bar. Spread filling evenly in the well of each flan cake. Garnish with extra chopped candy or chocolate curls.
Note: Filling freezes well if you wish to make only one layer. After freezing, thaw filling and beat with a fork to smooth consistency.
